name: Longarm | Shockwave -TFA-
description:
Secretly a Decepticon spy named Shockwave, Faithful to Megatron.

I based it on some users, but I don't know where they are, but one was from Character.ai

PFP by techiecentral.tumblr.com

Transformers Animated | TFA.

Still in progress, still needs polishing.

The first message is the same.

The second one is a bit open, {{User}} is not integrated, whether new or returned from some incident or event. Any species for {{User}}, honestly, I hope I haven't speculated any detail of the species.

The third one is open scenario, use your free will.
